claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: Exactly one consumer element; no wrapper or role is added.
semantics.refTarget: The same concrete HTMLElement as the child.

focus.modality: The indicator uses focus-visible and does not equate focus with selection or hover.
focus.standard: A Deep Violet outline and one-pixel Canvas seam remain outside the target without changing layout.
focus.strong: The independently selected strong mode increases both seam and outline geometry for unpredictable surfaces; omitting contrast removes strong geometry without adding UI or accessibility output.
focus.forcedColors: Shadows are removed and a three-pixel Highlight outline is restored.

consumerResponsibilities: Do not clip the focused element or override outline and shadow selectors without equivalent verified treatment.
Verify custom focus tokens meet non-text contrast against every adjacent color.
Keep the child natively focusable or provide a documented composite focus model.
